title: Crownflame Lift Guild
atAGlance: The Lift Guild keeps Kharad-Vul alive by managing chain towers, cargo cages, and emergency ascents between lower and upper districts.
sageNotes: No crown decree moves faster than a liftman with a wrench and a grudge. The guild knows which chains are safe, which brakes are lying, and which overseers can be bribed to delay an evacuation queue. Their public oath is service to the city; their private truth is that lift priority decides who survives a breach night. Most captains treat them with respect, because nobody wants to climb five terraces in full armor when the ash alarms start.
gameInformation: Use as a logistics power broker that can grant or deny vertical access. Benefits: shortcut routes, heavy cargo movement, emergency evac windows. Costs: political favors, labor protection demands, or priority conflicts between military and civilian lifts. Complication trigger: sabotage to chain braking systems during active evacuation.
